title: The site register
description: Register sites by hand, or import hundreds from a spreadsheet.

steps.title: Every site in the programme
steps.voiceScript: This is the register of every site in the programme.
steps.captionText: This is the register of every site in the programme.
steps.fallbackMessage: Every site in the programme: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add one by hand
steps.voiceScript: A single site can be registered by hand.
steps.captionText: A single site can be registered by hand.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add one by hand: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Or import a spreadsheet
steps.description: Hundreds of rows, in one upload.
steps.voiceScript: But a real programme arrives as a spreadsheet. Upload it here.
steps.captionText: But a real programme arrives as a spreadsheet. Upload it here.
steps.fallbackMessage: Or import a spreadsheet: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Nothing is written until you commit
steps.voiceScript: The upload does not touch the register. It is staged, so you see exactly what would be created -- duplicates caught, invalid rows rejected -- and nothing is written until you commit it.
steps.captionText: The upload does not touch the register. It is staged, so you see exactly what would be created -- duplicates caught, invalid rows rejected -- and nothing is written until you commit it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Nothing is written until you commit: not visible on this screen yet.
